_comment: deploy.ps1 in this folder builds every required parameter inline via --parameters key=value and does not consume this file directly. It is shipped to (1) document the schema for anyone running 'az deployment group create --template-file infra/main.bicep --parameters @infra/main.parameters.json --parameters webappImage=... backendFqdn=...' manually, and (2) hold safe defaults that match deploy.ps1 so a hand-rolled invocation produces the same shape of Container App. Required (no safe default) parameters: containerAppsEnvironmentId, acrName, webappAppName, webappImage, backendFqdn.

acrName.value: REQUIRED — ACR short name (assumed in the same RG as the deployment)
